title: Hello World
description: Write your first C program following the classic tradition.
problemStatement:
Welcome to the world of C! Your goal is to write a simple program that prints `"Hello, Progly!"` to the console followed by a newline.

**Requirement:** Use the `printf()` function and include the appropriate header.
hints: You must include `#include <stdio.h>` at the top of your file.
The entry point of every C program is the `int main()` function.
Don't forget the semicolon `;` at the end of each statement!
